title: Value Receiver — Area
instruction: Define Rectangle with Width and Height and an Area() int method. Create 5x10 and print area.
hint: func (r Rectangle) Area() int { return r.Width * r.Height }

title: Pointer Receiver — Increment
instruction: Define Counter with Count int and Increment() with pointer receiver. Create counter, call Increment three times, print count.

title: Stringer Interface
instruction: Define Person and String() method returning "<Name> (<Age>)". Print a Person.
hint: func (p Person) String() string { return fmt.Sprintf("%s (%d)", p.Name, p.Age) }

title: Method Chaining (Builder)
instruction: Chain .Add("Hello").Add("World") on Builder and print Build() result.
